channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Netflix confirms Assassin’s Creed has started filming — but fans aren’t happy about where the coordinates are set
item.description: Assassin's Creed has started filming, but not everyone is happy with some of the creative decisions.

item.title: ‘Project Hail Mary’ Is Poised to Become a Big Hit
item.description: Ryan Gosling's new movie just hit theaters but had a record-setting first evening at the box office.

item.title: I tested the Minisforum MS-02 Ultra and this impressive mini PC workstation proved to be a powerful option for AI development and creators
item.description: A compact, highly expandable mini workstation that features the latest enterprise-grade networking, a powerful AI-enhanced CPU, and a modular design.

item.title: Nintendo is reportedly making a Switch 2 with a user-replaceable battery for the EU
item.description: Nintendo is reportedly preparing a new version of the Switch 2 with a user-replaceable battery, according to Nikkei. This is to comply with a 2023 EU "right-to-repair" policy on portable electronics that mandates easy battery replacement. The regulation also covers the Joy-Con 2 controllers, so they are reportedly being redesigned to allow users to replace each lithium-ion battery. We don't know when this new Switch 2 will hit store shelves, but the policy gives companies until 2027 to make the required changes. This is great news for Europe, but the rest of the world isn't quite so lucky. The...

item.title: A French Navy officer accidentally leaked the location of an aircraft carrier by logging his run on Strava
item.description: A French naval officer went on a run around the deck of the Charles de Gaulle aircraft carrier, inadvertently leaking the warship's location when he uploaded the workout to Strava.

item.title: Netflix’s Assassin’s Creed is officially set in ancient Rome
item.description: Netflix’s live-action Assassin’s Creed show has entered production and will officially be set in Rome in the year 64AD, confirming previous reports. The upcoming adaptation, then, will return to the setting of 2010’s Assassin’s Creed Brotherhood, although the latter’s story took place more than 1,000 years after the events we'll see in Netflix's show. Ubisoft confirmed in a press release that the Netflix series will tell an original story centered on a war between the Templar Order and the Assassin Brotherhood, who each have very different ideas on how the future of mankind should look. The fu...

item.title: Comment programmer un DM sur Instagram pour l’envoyer plus tard ?
item.description: Initialement créé comme une appli de partage de photos, Instagram est rapidement devenu une app de messagerie à part entière. Et la dernière fonctionnalité d’envoi programmé de message le montre bien.

item.title: I’m Helpless Against the ’80s Nostalgia in Philips’ New Wireless Speakers and Headphones
item.description: Just take my money.

item.title: Kevin O’Leary: CEOs who blindly pursue AI are ‘dead in the water’
item.description: The ‘Shark Tank’ star and investor urged leaders to instead strategically pair the technology with communication and critical thinking skills. Investor and Shark Tank personality Kevin O’Leary said CEOs who blindly pursue AI are “dead in the water”. But the winning formula, he said, is pairing AI with storytelling and critical thinking.

item.title: Maddie Ziegler’s new action film ‘Pretty Lethal’ features a new blend of dance and combat fighting: ‘Ballet-Fu’
item.description: The director and cast of the movie about five elite ballerinas took Fast Company behind the scenes in a recent panel at SXSW. When actress Maddie Ziegler first read the script for the film Pretty Lethal, which premiered at SXSW over the weekend, she was immediately drawn to it because of its authenticity—even if, sure, the ballerinas are also seen scrappily fighting like a bunch of feral cats. ...

item.title: Kalshi Has Been Temporarily Banned in Nevada
item.description: A judge ordered Kalshi to immediately halt sports and election contracts in the state, intensifying a growing regulatory battle over prediction markets.

item.title: Meta isn’t closing down its VR metaverse after all — it’ll stay live in a limited capacity for ‘the foreseeable future’
item.description: Meta's CTO has revealed it won't shut down Horizon Worlds in VR after all.

item.title: Ce SSD de 5 To est à -25 % alors que la crise continue de faire des ravages
item.description: L'Easy Store 5 To de Western Digital est une très bonne solution pour avoir un important espace de stockage dans sa poche. En ce moment, il est disponible chez Darty pour 129,99 euros grâce à une remise de 40 euros.

item.title: Switch 2 : la batterie serait bientôt plus facile à remplacer, merci l’Europe
item.description: Nintendo préparerait une nouvelle version de la Switch 2 conçue pour en faciliter le remplacement de la batterie. Le constructeur n'aurait pas d'autre choix : il s'agit d'une obligation de la réglementation européenne.

item.title: Attention à cette faille de Proton VPN qui peut exposer vos données personnelles
item.description: Proton VPN est l'un des fournisseurs majeurs de VPN, il est pourtant beaucoup plus faillible qu'on ne le pense. La plateforme Privacy Guides a en effet mis en lumière une faille sur une fonctionnalité essentielle aux VPN : le Kill Switch.

item.title: Walmart drafts in Nvidia RTX 4000 GPU stock to cover RTX 5000 supply woes — will this become a growing trend?
item.description: Can't find (or afford) the Nvidia RTX 5000 GPU you want? Walmart is stocking more RTX 4000 models as alternatives.

item.title: Zara Larsson fans rioted after the singer supported AI-generated content. Now her controversial take is going viral
item.description: ‘I don’t ever see us going back to not using it,’ the pop star posted in defense of her own AI usage. Pop star Zara Larsson is the internet’s newest it girl. After a wave of viral hits, including her latest album’s title track “Midnight Sun” and her feature on PinkPantheress’ “Stateside” remix, the Swedish singer cemented herself as the next big thing in pop music....

item.title: WordPress.com now lets AI agents write and publish posts, and more
item.description: New AI agents on WordPress.com could lower barriers to publishing while increasing machine-generated content across the web.

item.title: Google Pixel Watch users are reporting wacky step counts, calories burned and other stats after Fitbit's March update
item.description: Google Pixel Watch users are running into frustrating issues in the Fitbit app, but either company has yet to address them.

item.title: The biggest heist of the US-China Chip War: 3 Supermicro employees charged with conspiracy to smuggle restricted Nvidia H100, H200, and B200 chips to China – dummy boxes, fake labels, and a pass-through company enabled the $2.5 billion scheme
item.description: Three men are facing charges of conspiracy to smuggle restricted GPUs to China.

item.title: Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026: Tablet deals are in full bloom with savings on the latest iPad Air
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is coming up, but tablets are already on sale. Save on Apple iPads, Samsung Galaxy Tabs, and Amazon Fire Kids tablets.

item.title: Meilleurs casques Bluetooth en 2026 : quel modèle choisir ?
item.description: Vous ne savez pas quel casque Bluetooth choisir dans cet océan de références ? Nous avons réalisé une sélection des meilleurs casques audio Bluetooth parmi tous ceux que nous avons pu tester en 2025 et 2026.

item.title: Valve's Steam Machine gets its first support update ahead of launch via SteamOS preview 3.8.0 — and it includes one major fix I've been waiting for
item.description: The Steam Machine could be closer than we expected after its recent delay, as Valve released SteamOS 3.8.0 preview for initial hardware support.

item.title: Drew Goddard Says the Sony Hack Killed His ‘Sinister Six’ Movie
item.description: Although that certainly didn't stop Sony from trying to set another spin on it up... to incredibly mixed results.

item.title: Pakistan’s solar boom is helping it save billions during the ongoing energy crisis
item.description: Over the past few years, Pakistan has adopted solar power at unprecedented rates. That’s helping cushion it from the effects of the war in Iran. Pakistan gets almost all its oil and gas from the Middle East, where U.S. and Israeli bombing of Iran have caused crude prices to blow past $150 a barrel and tankers can’t get through the Strait of Hormuz. But it has one edge in the crisis: a rapid, recent shift to solar power....

item.title: “Thank you for getting us to this point” — I thought Sam Altman’s tweet about coders was nice — then I read it again
item.description: Sam Altman’s latest tweet thanks the coders who “got us to this point” — but a closer look at that phrasing raises a bigger question about what happens next.

item.title: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin enters the space data center game
item.description: "Project Sunrise" would include more than 50,000 satellites performing high-energy compute on orbit.

item.title: The big Secretlab sale price-cuts the most comfortable gaming and office chair we've ever reviewed for the home office
item.description: A true home office upgrade - this office chair deal is perfect for work and play, with comfort in a league of its own.

item.title: Iran War Puts Global Energy Markets on the Brink of a Worst-Case Scenario
item.description: “This will be so, so, so, so, so bad,” one analyst says.

item.title: CD Projekt Red shares 'important development update' for its unknown third franchise called 'Hadar' — 'Work on the project is progressing dynamically, and the team has established the foundations of this entirely new IP'
item.description: CD Projekt Red has provided a new update on The Witcher 4's development as well as progress on its mystery third franchise, codenamed Hadar.

item.title: US accuses Iran’s government of operating hacktivist group that hacked Stryker
item.description: The U.S. Justice Department said an Iranian security ministry operates the fake activist persona known as Handala, which claimed responsibility for the destructive hack targeting medical tech giant Stryker.

item.title: Don’t wait for memory prices to go higher — save $50 on 64GB of super-fast Crucial Pro OC DDR5-6000 RAM in this limited-time deal
item.description: Save $50 on 64GB of super-fast Crucial Pro OC DDR5-6000 RAM in this limited-time deal at Best Buy.

item.title: Trump’s AI framework targets state laws, shifts child safety burden to parents
item.description: Trump’s AI framework pushes federal preemption of state laws, emphasizes innovation, and shifts responsibility for child safety toward parents while laying out lighter-touch rules for tech companies.

item.title: Snag some serious DJI discounts before the Amazon Big Spring Sale lands
item.description: As of March 18, these are the DJI deals on offer ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Super Micro Co-Founder Charged With Smuggling $2.5 Billion of AI Tech Into China
item.description: Co-Founder and Vice President Yih-Shyan Liaw could face up to 30 years in prison.

item.title: It’s the First Day of Spring—but the US West Is Already Bracing for a Brutal Summer
item.description: The combined impact of a historic snow drought, early heat wave, and above-average Pacific Ocean temperatures could fuel a vicious drought and wildfire season.

item.title: La proposition de Mistral pour soutenir la création européenne : faire payer l’IA
item.description: L'industrie de l'IA et le secteur de la création se regardent en chiens de faïence : le premier a besoin d'entraîner ses modèles avec des contenus, le second veut mettre un terme au pillage de ses œuvres protégérs par le droit d'auteur. Mistral propose une solution pour mettre tout le monde d'accord, et remettre l'Europe au centre du jeu.

item.title: Crimson Desert ne fonctionne pas si vous avez une carte graphique Intel et vous ne pouvez rien y faire
item.description: Les développeurs de Crimson Desert ont mis à jour leur FAQ avec une nouvelle qui enrage une partie des joueurs.

item.title: Project Hail Mary ending explained: what happens to Ryland Grace and Rocky, will there be a sequel, and more on Ryan Gosling's new sci-fi movie
item.description: You've got big questions about Project Hail Mary's ending — and I'm here to answer them.

item.title: 'Is Marathon a success? Unfortunately, no, not yet' — Former Xbox exec says Bungie's new extraction shooter was built at a scale and cost that the current market 'simply isn't rewarding'
item.description: Former Microsoft Game Studios executive producer Laura Fryer believes Bungie's extraction shooter Marathon is a success among players, but the studio has a long road ahead to make the game worth its investment.

item.title: -25 % pour cette rivale de la GoPro et de la DJI Osmo Action, elle devient incontournable
item.description: Bonne nouvelle pour les baroudeurs : l’Insta360 Ace Pro 2, une caméra d’action idéale pour immortaliser vos aventures, voit son prix chuter de 449 euros à 339 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Stick vacuums on sale ahead of Amazons spring sale: Shark is dunking on Dyson right now
item.description: Ahead of Amazon's Big Spring Sale, shop deals on the most powerful Shark vacuum and most affordable self-emptying stick vacuum.

item.title: Crypto.com CEO is the latest boss to blame AI as he lays off 12% of staff
item.description: ‘Companies that do not make this pivot immediately will fail,’ Marszalek wrote. The CEO of Crypto.com, Kris Marszalek, announced on Thursday that he was laying off 12% of the company’s staff. Marszalek cited AI as the driving factor behind the layoffs. Here’s what you need to know.

item.title: The best TV deals ahead of Amazons Spring Sale — score budget QLED TVs at record-low prices
item.description: Ahead of Amazon's Big Spring Sale, TV deals on top models

item.title: La mise à jour arrive, les Samsung Galaxy S26 vont enfin pouvoir utiliser AirDrop
item.description: Le partage de fichiers entre l'univers Apple et les smartphones Android s'apprête à franchir un cap historique. Samsung vient de confirmer l'intégration prochaine de la compatibilité AirDrop via son outil Quick Share sur sa toute nouvelle gamme Galaxy S26.

item.title: Project Hail Mary could teach humanity a thing or two
item.description: It's hard not to find the premise of Andy Weir's Project Hail Mary instantly compelling: Something is slowly killing the sun and threatening life on Earth. That same mysterious force, dubbed the Astrophage, also destroyed every nearby star — except one. Our only hope is to visit that solar system and figure out what helped it survive. And there's just one middle school science teacher who can do it. At its core is Weir's love of technical problem solving, along with a tremendous performance by Ryan Gosling in full nerd hero mode as the aforementioned science teacher (and former molecular biolo...

item.title: États-Unis | Nouvelle tentative du gouvernement Trump pour empêcher les États de réguler l’IA
item.description: Le gouvernement Trump a appelé vendredi le Congrès à légiférer pour empêcher les États américains de voter leurs propres lois de régulation de l’intelligence artificielle (IA), une nouvelle tentative après un premier échec l’été dernier.

item.title: AI startups are eating the venture industry and the returns, so far, are good
item.description: AI startups accounted for 41% of the $128 billion in venture dollars raised by companies on Carta last year — a record-high annual share.

item.title: Amazon has slashed the Fire TV Stick 4K Select to its lowest price ever thanks to an easy-to-miss coupon
item.description: The Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Select gets you everything you need for a dirt-cheap price.

item.title: Does Nvidia’s Slop-ified DLSS 5 Game Lighting Make Any Sense?
item.description: Nvidia finally reveals what's actually going on with its upscaler, and it's much less impressive than it first seemed.
